infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to track your deliveries.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Background location is needed for live delivery tracking.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow GroceryOS Delivery to use your location for live tracking.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow GroceryOS Delivery to use your location in background.
